title: マチカネフクキタル登場！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On a very particular day for auspicious wonders,
Matikanefukukitaru gains an abundance of good
luck.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Believing this to be the grace of the great
Shiraoki, she begins preparing for the Twinkle
Series.
